vulnerablePopulations: Men in rural areas with limited access
epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: DRE, PSA, IPSS score, TRUS, SBU guidelines

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: SBU guidelines, DRE + PSA + IPSS, TRUS via SUS
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Medical: alpha-blockers (tamsulosin), 5-alpha reductase inhibitors (finasteride) via SUS; Surgical: TURP, HoLEP for severe cases
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Limited access to advanced surgical techniques (HoLEP), long wait times for TURP in SUS, underdiagnosis in rural areas
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: SBU guidelines, alpha-blockers/finasteride via SUS, TURP widely available
